evals.prompt: 把这篇英文双栏论文 PDF 转成 Markdown，保留图片和版面中提取出来的 figure 资源。
evals.expected_output: Create <pdf_stem>.md next to the input PDF and produce an accompanying <pdf_stem>_images/ directory when images are extracted.
expectations: The skill invokes the MinerU API path rather than any deprecated remote backend.
The output Markdown file is written next to the input PDF.
An images directory with the same stem is created when the parser extracts images.

evals.prompt: 把这份中文 PDF 转成 Markdown，语言提示用 ch。
evals.expected_output: Run the API conversion with the Chinese language hint and emit Markdown beside the PDF.
expectations: The conversion command passes the ch language hint.
The output remains <pdf_stem>.md beside the source PDF.
If MINERU_API_TOKEN is missing, the response clearly tells the user that this token is required.

evals.prompt: Convert this research paper PDF to Markdown and prioritize parsing quality for formulas and tables.
evals.expected_output: Use the API-only VLM backend and produce Markdown plus extracted image assets in the source directory.
expectations: The skill uses the API-only VLM backend.
The response does not mention or use any removed remote-GPU backend.
